title: Finding Percentiles and the Interquartile Range (IQR)
description: A step-by-step flowchart illustrating the process of calculating the 25th and 75th percentiles and the IQR for a dataset.
relationships: Start with Unsorted Dataset -> Sort it to create Sorted Dataset
Use Sorted Dataset and formula (n+1)*0.25 to calculate position of Q1
Use Sorted Dataset and formula (n+1)*0.75 to calculate position of Q3
Find the value at (or interpolate between) the calculated position for Q1
Find the value at (or interpolate between) the calculated position for Q3
Subtract Q1 value from Q3 value to get the final IQR
